description: Jumio provides identity verification and authentication products for customer onboarding, fraud prevention, and compliance workflows. Its platform supports web, SDK, mobile, and API-based integrations for document, selfie, and risk-based verification flows.
summary: Jumio exposes a regional OAuth2-protected REST API plus official Java and .NET client libraries that use the same OAuth2 client credentials; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or standalone CLI was found.
